### Post by gvi70000 on 2007-07-16
i want to enable desktop effect but i get this mesage all the time "The Composite extension is not available". I have an ATI X1800GTO video card.
My xorg.conf looks like this:

# /etc/X11/xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using

### Post by firmwire on 2007-07-16
Have you installed XGL and Compiz Fusion or Beryl?

### Post by gvi70000 on 2007-07-17
I have Beryl

PS: Last night ihave install ati driver from amd site and still does'n work

---

### Post by Rui Pais on 2007-07-17
Hi,
maybe this has nothing to do with your issue but in your xorg you have:
> Section "DRI"
Mode 0666
EndSection
Section "Extensions"
Option "Composite" "Enable"
Option "Composite" "0"
EndSection
Seems that you are enable and disable Composite simultaneosly. 
Try remove the line: Option "Composite" "0" and restart X server.

Good luck

---
